meaning: n.托洛茨基分子,托派分子
examples: For some of Lorlene's older Trotskyite friends, it was simpler still. There were no such things as mishaps; life was a series of remarkable conspiracies.
For the next, the pollsters predict he will get just 5-6%, behind even Arlette Arguiller, the amusingly perennial Trotskyite candidate.
Arlette Laguiller , leader of the Trotskyite Workers' Struggle, is an almost iconic figure: in 1974 she was the first woman to run for president.
